places.name: Modern Toilet Restaurant
places.description: Looking for a crappy restaurant? Pull up a porcelain bowl and enjoy your meal.

places.name: Tuned Mass Damper of Taipei 101
places.description: Enormous pendulum helps keep Taiwan's tallest building from swaying.

places.name: Rixing Type Foundry
places.description: Taiwan's last Chinese character letterpress preserves the dying art of Chinese character mold making.

places.name: Leaning Mailboxes
places.description: These charming mailboxes became social media stars after a typhoon failed to topple them.

places.name: Grand Hotel Tunnel
places.description: Air-raid tunnels hidden beneath this opulent hotel provided shelter and an escape route—and one of the world's longest slides.

places.name: Treasure Hill
places.description: This densely-packed cluster of buildings was saved from the wrecking ball and turned into an art community.

places.name: Bei Tou Incinerator
places.description: A waste incinerator with a restaurant on its chimney.

places.name: Chef Hung Beef Noodle Soup
places.description: Taiwan’s iconic dish is in peak form here.

places.name: Jadeite Cabbage With Insects
places.description: An imperial art museum offers edible versions of its most treasured displays in an on-site fine-dining restaurant.
